customer_query: How can I return a product?

context.policy_summary: Eligible products may be returned within 30 days if unused and in original packaging.

assistant_response: You can return eligible products within 30 days of delivery, as long as they are unused and in their original packaging. If you share the product name or order number, I can guide you more precisely.

customer_query: I want to return an opened hygiene product.
assistant_response: I’m sorry, but opened hygiene products are not eligible for return under EcoMarket’s policy. I understand that may be disappointing. If the product arrived damaged or incorrect, please share your order number and we can review the case.

customer_query: Can I return a perishable item?
assistant_response: Perishable goods are not eligible for return under our policy. If the item arrived damaged or there was an issue with delivery, please provide the order number and any relevant details so we can assist you.

customer_query: My product arrived damaged. What should I do?
assistant_response: I’m sorry your item arrived damaged. Please share your order number and, if possible, photos of the damage. Damaged products can be reviewed for assistance even when other return restrictions may apply.

customer_query: I am very upset and I want to file a complaint.
assistant_response: I’m sorry you’ve had this experience. Your case should be escalated to a human support specialist who can assist you personally and review the situation in more detail.

customer_query: What kind of questions can you help me with?
assistant_response: I can help with order status, return policy questions, and general support requests. For more complex or sensitive situations, I can also direct the case to a human support specialist.
